pi_items.source: setup_task.sh downloads real earthquake data from https://earthquake.usgs.gov/fdsnws/event/1/query.
Both setup_task.sh and verifier.py hardcode this path.
task.json specifies these in instructions. verifier.py checks presence of formula for categories, and checks evaluated values for the rest.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 150 real earthquake records from January 2024 downloaded via the USGS API. The data is saved to /home/ga/Documents/earthquake_catalog.xlsx. The agent must categorize earthquakes (requiring IF) and calculate summary stats (using COUNTIF, AVERAGE, MAX, MIN, COUNTA). The verifier primarily checks the evaluated values rather than strictly matching formula names.
